user_reaction_message: I was transferring files for an approved project backup.
close_note: User violated data exfiltration policy. Escalated to HR.
ai_summary: User john.doe attempted to copy confidential HR records to a removable USB drive. The action was detected by endpoint DLP and flagged as a high-severity policy violation.

source.outline: Spreadsheet containing employee salary and compensation data for 250 employees in the Engineering department.

destination.outline: USB removable storage device used as destination for confidential HR file transfer.

source.outline: File read from USB removable storage during end event of the data transfer sequence.

destination.outline: Personal Google Drive account used as destination for unauthorized data upload containing HR confidential records.
